creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 223284
Patch file

Update to 3.7.1, which includes security fixes of CVE-2021-20231 and CVE-2021-20232.

Release Note: https://lists.gnupg.org/pipermail/gnutls-help/2021-March/004698.html

Bug #254298 describes vulnerabilities fixed with this release. So please commit it together.
